name: Mayonnaise
recipeIngredient: Green onions, chopped finely, half cup
Lemon juice, half of the juice of
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except the oil in a blender or food processor with the center of the lid removed.
2. Blend or process for 2 minutes.
3. Slowly pour the oil in a thin stream through the top or feed tube until fully incorporated.
4. Continue blending or processing for an additional 30 seconds.
5. Makes approximately 2-1/2 cups.
